zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm於1533年出生在英國蘇格蘭希倫德金泰爾時，她的父親Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail21歲，母親Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail21歲。她於1577年之前與Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry結婚。她去世於1592年4月12日在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm于1533年出生在英国苏格兰希倫德金泰爾时，她的父亲Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail21岁，母亲Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail21岁。她于1577年之前与Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry结婚。她去世于1592年4月12日在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾享年59岁，埋葬在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm was born in 1533, in Kintail, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, was 21 and her mother, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, was 21. She married Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry before 1577. She died on 12 April 1592, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm est née en 1533, à Kintail, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry avant 1577. Elle est décédée le 12 avril 1592, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm 1533 in Kintail, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail 21 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail 21. Sie hat vor 1577 Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry geheiratet. Sie starb am 12. April 1592 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm è nata il nel 1533 nel Kintail, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry prima del 1577. Morì il 12 aprile 1592, nel Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholmが1533年にイギリススコットランドヒグhランドキンティイルで生まれた時，父Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintailは21歳，母Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintailは21歳であった。1577年以前にAngus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarryと結婚した。彼女は1592年4月12日にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで59歳で死去し，スコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm(이)가 1533년 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1577년 이전 Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1592년 4월 12일 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm nasceu em 1533, em Kintail, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry antes 1577. Ela faleceu em 12 de abril de 1592, em Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Mary Mackenzie of Kintail, relic of Glengarry, latterly of Comar - Chisholm родилась в 1533 г. в местности кинтеил, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry перед 1577 г. Она умерла 12 апреля 1592 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Angus MacAlister - Æneas MacDonald 7th of Glengarry antes de 1577. Murió el 12 de abril de 1592, en Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland.
